image.title: NAL Williams, AJ Gallant, S Rasmussen, LA Brown Nicholls, N Cogan, K Deakin, D Young, P Flowers

item.title: Towards intervention development to increase the uptake of COVID-19 vaccination among those at high risk: Outlining evidence-based and theoretically informed future intervention content.
